item.title: Stereo receiver - Pyle PT 390AU - $150 (PROVIDENCE, RI)
item.description: new. still in original box. used only once.

item.title: SCOTT SILVER FACE Vintage Scott AM/FM stereo receiver - $75 (Portsmouth)
item.description: Have speakers and can show you that it works can do (AM/FM) don't have anything else to input. So this tests most of the unit...So try it before you buy it. Dial lights and all indicator lights work.... Nice Old School Unit........Located in Portsmouth RI

item.title: JVC RX-6000V 5.1 Channel Surround Sound AM/FM Stereo Receiver 500W wit - $85 (Riverside)
item.description: About the JVC RX-6000V

item.title: Yamaha Stereo Receiver and Sony Speakers - $80 (North Kingstown)
item.description: Yamaha RX-V540 stereo receiver

item.title: Vintage multi-function stereo system - $40 (PROVIDENCE, RI)
item.description: Fisher stereo system: AM/FM tuner (works great!). turntable (not tested). 8-track (not tested). cassette player (not tested).

item.title: Vintage working Vector Research Stereo Receiver VR-7000 Made in Japan - $300
item.description: Vector Research components were designed in California and built in Japan to compete with NAD, Luxman, etc. TechHifi used to sell them, if you're old enough to remember."thevintagehifishack" says:* "One of those rare surprises, its sound is simply stunning and in more than one opinion it out performs many of the big names"* " Snappy and precise with enough power to back it up, the sound is zero coloration and ultra fast..Here are the base specs: WPC RMS /8 Ohms* 105 WPC RMS /4 Ohms* 220 WPC Dynamic power /8 ohms* 0.01% THD* Power Consumption Rated at 420 Watts* 1978, Japan* Dimensions: 17 1/2'' x 14 1/2'' x 5 1/4''.

item.title: Technics SA-225 FM/AM Stereo receiver - $175 (Westerly, R.I.)
item.description: This vintage receiver from the 80's still works 100%; they built stuff to last back then! The audio quality is excellent; specs are below for the technically minded.

item.title: Vintage Technics cassette deck player - $30 (Westerly ri)
item.description: From estate I bought

item.title: Pro-ject Debut III turntable - $125 (Ashaway)
item.description: Excellent Pro-ject Debut III turntable in high gloss piano black. Original anti-skate hanging weight is included. Fully manual table in pristine condition. Great upgrade over entry models on the market for those into or wanting to get into vinyl. Priced well below EBay prices (not even factoring shipping costs if you were to buy on online and have it mailed).

item.title: Vintage Pioneer PL-41 turntable - $200 (Ashaway)
item.description: Outstanding vintage Pioneer PL-41 turntable. New stylus, new thrust bearing (a common replacement item over the life of this model.) Google reviews online. Condition of this unit is 9 out 10. Wooden plinth is awesome - and great looking vintage design item. Dust cover holds open with the designed `kick stand.' Audio output cables still have original Japanese paper labels! I also have a paper copy of the operator manual.

item.title: Amazing Polk SDA 1I Stereo Speakers - $349 (Cranston)
item.description: Beautiful pair of Polk SDA II floorstanding speakers. Very good condition, especially for the age. The original interconnect cable that goes from one speaker to the other is included. These speakers sound fantastic and can play very loud. Frequency response is incredible. They can handle up to 500 watts per channel. I have them hooked up in my garage for demonstration. Excellent condition. Were originally $1250 in 1983-4 which is $4000 in today's dollars. Great deal for $349 firm.

item.title: Vintage Technics cassette deck player - $40 (Westerly ri)
item.description: From estate I bought

item.description: Cash only. Meet up.

item.description: CR6002A-BK

item.title: Garmin GPS 12 GPS Receiver - $50 (Providence)
item.description: Used, needs power cord.

item.title: Sony turntable - $100 (PROVIDENCE, RI)
item.description: The Sony PS-LX300USB Turntable will let you make use of a record collection that is simply gathering dust. The Sound Forge system offers both silent and listening digitizing of songs. With this fully automatic turntable anybody can transfer the music from vinyl records to a digitally formatted file in moments. 1Connecting the included USB output cable to any compatible PC or notebook allows the included Audio Studio software to save the recording accurately in a digital format that is compatible with most modern stereos and portable music systems. In addition to the USB type of audio output the Sony PS-LX300USB also offers RCA output. You can connect it to any of your home theater speakers stereos receivers or amplifiers. It also works with your video player so you can enjoy a full entertainment experience in your home. This flexibility allows you to use the turntable for listening to music from its original vinyl format.The turntable's stylus offers durable construction that will not

item.description: Up for sale a Sansui 9900Z receiver.

item.title: Brick Stereo and Optimus Speakers - $150
item.description: Perfect for apartment or one room sound. All components in excellent condition. Has lived in an enclosed cabinet and very lightly used.

item.title: FOR SALE: MICRO SEIKI DD-40 TURNTABLE - $1,600
item.description: Up for sale one Micro Seiki DD-40 turntable in nice condition with original box and manual. Also, in good condition original dust cover, 45-RPM adapter and removable headshell. Comes with Ortofon VMS-30 cartridge. The plinth is rosewood veneer in excellent condition. I am the original owner purchased new in 1977. The turntable is 43 years old and has been sitting in the original box for over 15 years. There is a couple of small cracks near the dust cover hinges (see images). From a smoke free home. The turntable is sold as is per my description NO RETURNS.

item.title: Denon Receiver - $200
item.description: Denon Home Theater Receiver. Not much use on it, used it as a 2nd system in the house. Plenty of HDMI ports, My man cave has recently been turned into a kids playroom so no need for this anymore. Will sell for $200

item.description: Ion Profile Pro USB Input with Turntable Record Player

item.description: See pics. Comes with Remote! $40 firm.

item.description: Technics turntable

item.title: GRECOM PSR-600 DIGITAL TRUNKING SCANNING RECEIVER, MOBILE/BASE SCANNER - $250 (Cranston)
item.description: Purchased for my father many years ago is this like new condition GRECOM PSR-600 digital trunking scanner. Comes complete with all original paperwork, accessories and packaging. It has been powered on and seem to be in good working order, it is in scan mode and does seem to pick up local departments. This is undoubtably A LOT more complicated than the old school RadioShack scanners that I grew up with, as I do not know how to fully work it.

item.title: Wireless Speaker Kit - $25 (PROVIDENCE, RI)
item.description: Experience high-quality audio with the RocketFish RF-WHTIB-A Wireless Rear Speaker Kit. It enables a wireless (not to be confused with WiFi) connection from a stereo receiver or TV, etc. to a set of speakers. Perfect for those situations in which wired connections are not possible.

item.title: Onkyo DX-C390 6 Disc CD Changer - $49 (Cranston)
item.description: Beautiful Onkyo DX-C390 six disc CD changer in excellent condition. Works great and sounds fantastic. No remote but they can be bought online if you want one. See my other ad for Onkyo receiver. They make a nice pair. It is hooked up in my garage for demonstration. Good deal for $49 firm.

item.title: Vizio Sound Bar - $75 (Woonsocket)
item.description: VIZIO Sound Bar used works great has cosmetic issues but doesn't affect sound, remote missing back.

item.title: 2004 Harley Davidson 1200 Sportster - $3,000 (Cranston)
item.description: Harley Davidson 1200 sportster in excellent shape very low miles stereo system snap on and off windshield chaps riding accessories. Lots of extra chrome come check it out. It's spring people summer is right around the corner.

item.title: Line 6 SonicPort VX Recording System - $50 (Chepachet)
item.description: This is an excellent combination USB Audio Interface and Stereo Condenser Microphone and guitar processor in one. B+H sells it for $199.00 (link below) and you know they usually have the best price on these types of things. It's only seen little use in my smoke free home & includes all cables including lightning cable for iPhone. If you are reading this it is still available, and the price is firm. It is in like new condition.

item.title: Garmin GPS 12 XL - $75 (Providence)
item.description: Garmin GPS XL receiver. Used. Excellent condition. Needs power cord.

item.title: Fargen diagonal 2x12 cab with great speakers - $500 (North Providence)
item.description: Fargen oval open-back diagonal 2x12 cabinet in a sweet orange tolex with some fun fading patterns on it. Includes a WGS ET65 speaker in the bottom (American voicing with great low-mids) and Celestion Neo Creamback in the top (greenback-style upper mids and keeps the cabinet very light). Plug & play jack so you can run each 8 ohm speaker separately in stereo or both speakers in series (16 ohm) or in parallel (4 ohm).

item.title: 2016 HARLEY DAVIDSON ROAD GLIDE ULTRA - $17,999 (Portsmouth RI)
item.description: 2016 Harley Davidson Road Glide Ultra, only 12,300 miles. Original owner. Garaged, covered. All services done at Harley Davidson. Additional items. Screaming Eagle high flow ventilation air cleaner, driver back rest, highway pegs, chrome passenger footrest covers, rear tire replace at 9096 miles, lithium battery installed at 10547 miles, Screaming Eagle muffler, end caps and stage one tuning kit. Quick release for trunk and passenger backrest. Additional negotiable items. Full face HD helmet, two women's half helmets in excellent condition, lithium battery charger, two men's HD riding jackets. Premium HD stereo helmet headset. HD full helmet music and communication headset, HD motorcycle cover, bladder suspension pump. Kelly Blue book lists at $21,100. Motivated seller.

item.title: Apple iPod Dock with Remote Control & ONE iPod - $160 (Riverside)
item.description: This thing is 20 years old but still sounds great. Always liked it better than the Bose.

item.description: Built-in receiver synchronizes to the government radio time signal.

item.title: Vintage Fisher Price Record Player Model 835 - $50 (Attleboro Falls)
item.description: Complete set with turntable and speakers. The dust cover lowers and raises the arm. Plays but the sound quality is not good because it most likely needs a new needle. Housing is in very good condition. Some scratches on the dust cover. I believe the manufacturer's date is 1983. Cash sale. Pickup in North Attleboro.

item.description: Well maintained and used very little since purchase from original owners in January 2022. This model has a lot of storage space for a small camper. Weight is approx. 3500lbs, easily towable with small pickup or large SUV. Available with a weight distribution receiver hitch if needed.

item.title: Yamaha HTR-5740 Dolby Surround sound system, etc with manual - $400 (Warwick)
item.description: Barely used Yamaha HTR-5740 Dolby surround sound system with YST-SW015 Subwoofer, manual, and Sony TC-WE475 cassette tape deck for sale.

item.title: Olympus S725 Pearlcorder Microcassette Recorder - $85 (West Warwick, RI)
item.description: The Olympus S725 Pearlcorder Microcassette Recorder comes with voice activation so you can utilize it "hands-free" recording if desired. It also features fast play mode for playback that is 25-percent faster, and external jacks for a remote control, headphones, earphones, and AC power.

item.description: Beautiful Samick Baby Grand player Piano with updated MP3 player with cassette. $1350 obo. More information can be found at: https://www.pianocorder.info/

item.title: Complete Stereo System - $300 (Middletown)
item.description: ONKYO TX SR501/AV Stereo Receiver, ONKYO TA RW344 Stereo Tape Deck, PANASONIC Compact Disk Changer, pair of POLK AUDIO Model S6 Woodgrain Speakers (10"W x 21"H). Includes owner's manuals and remote controls. Excellent Condition

item.title: DR Redi-Plow Plus - $1,499 (Wakefield)
item.description: DR Redi-Plow Plus

item.title: Vintage Rowe AMI CD Jukebox - $300 (Tiverton)
item.description: Classic Rowe AMI CD Jukebox from the CD-100 series (late 80s to 90s). Holds up to 100 CDs and has a great retro look with lights, keypad, and stereo sound. Was working until recently - now powers on but no longer plays CDs. Could be a simple fix for someone familiar with these machines or great as a display piece. Compact Disc model, digital keypad + bill acceptor, good cosmetic condition for its age, heavy-duty commercial build, great for bars, game rooms, collectors, vintage decor or man-cave. All original parts. Comes with two keys - 1) display case to load CDs and 2) money box. Asking $300 or best offer - Cash only

item.title: 29ft. Travel Trailer - $15,000 (Westerly RI)
item.description: Ultra light 29ft MPG travel trailer in exceptional condition. One bedroom with king bed, dinette table drops to sleep one or two, dinette slide out, full bath with shower, full kitchen, two tvs one in living area one in bedroom. Outside kitchen with grille, electric awning, outside speakers for stereo. Ducked heat and ac. Call for more details.

item.title: 2023 EZ Hauler 6'X12' V Nose camper - $26,000 (Smithfield, RI)
item.description: Don't know where to begin! There is so much packed into this trailer that it's crazy! First it is a 2023 EZ Hauler all aluminum trailer. The frame and body are all aluminum. No rust or maintenance needed here. I have been in the trades most of my life so it has the BEST of everything. Let me

item.title: Denon AVR-2000 Surround Receiver w/ Remote - $75 (East Providence)
item.description: Precision audio component with DSP and multiple input options. This Denon amplifier is in excellent condition. I give it a 9.5/10. All inputs and outputs are working clearly and 100%. In addition to the amp I have the original remote control that came with this unit. I have been using it for the last 6 years and now upgrading to a different system. Has phono imputs as vinyl records are becoming the "THING" today. Please look over all photos and I also have a short video of amp playing but is not supported on this site so if you would like to see and hear it, send me a message with your email and I will send it to you. No static in controls and as I say 100% working, cosmetically almost mint and the bottom has all its' original feet. Awesome amp if this is what you are looking for. I guarantee you will like or money back. Cash only and door pick up. Thanks for viewing!

item.title: Towing hitch receivers - $150 (Johnston)
item.description: $150 or best offer

item.description: 5.1 onkyo receiver and bookshelf speakers, everything's works great, I upgraded my setup and no longer need these.

item.title: Yamaha reciver - $300 (Johbston)
item.description: Yamaha receiver ra-750 with remote! Cash only, no venmo or checks.

item.title: Universal Audio UAD-2 Duo and Quad PCIe Cards with Extra Plugins - $1,000 (North Providence)
item.description: I'm selling two of my UAD PCIe DSP accelerator cards. One is a Quad, and the other is a Duo. Combined, they give you up to 6 SHARC chips for performing plugin processing with your Universal Audio system. I used these on a Windows system along with my UA Apollo and an Octo.
